summary.zh: 用受控透视和旋转展示卡片正反面或悬停深度。
summary.en: Use controlled perspective and rotation for card flips or hover depth.

definition.zh: 在三维空间中通过 rotateX 或 rotateY 旋转，增加纵深感。
definition.en: Rotation around the X or Y axis creates a plane-turning effect within a perspective scene.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 用受控透视展示卡片正反面或指针悬停产生的轻微深度。
purpose.en: Use controlled perspective for card faces or subtle pointer-driven depth.

frequency.zh: 适合低频探索和重点卡片；高密度列表避免每张卡持续倾斜。
frequency.en: Reserve for low-frequency exploration and featured cards; avoid continuous tilt across dense lists.

trigger.zh: 由明确翻面操作或精细指针悬停触发，触摸设备使用点击切换。
trigger.en: Trigger from an explicit flip action or fine-pointer hover, with tap toggling on touch devices.

enterExit.zh: 翻面过程中在 90° 附近切换可见面，退出时沿最短角度返回。
enterExit.en: Switch the visible face near 90° during the flip and return along the shortest angle on exit.

interruptibility.zh: 再次操作时从当前旋转角度改向，并保持正反面可见性同步。
interruptibility.en: Retarget from the current angle and keep face visibility synchronized when operated again.

gestureRules.zh: 指针倾斜限制最大角度并在离开时归中；键盘只触发离散翻面。
gestureRules.en: Cap pointer tilt and recenter on leave; keyboard interaction triggers a discrete flip.

reducedMotion.zh: 使用即时正反面切换或短交叉淡化，关闭 3D 旋转和透视位移。
reducedMotion.en: Use an immediate face switch or short crossfade with 3D rotation and perspective travel removed.

reviewNotes.zh: 检查 backface-visibility 与阅读顺序。
确保悬停倾斜不会移动按钮点击目标。
reviewNotes.en: Keep button hit targets stable during hover tilt.
